# JsonValues.SafeIntegerMax field

Inclusive upper bound for safe identifiers and counters: `2^53 − 1` (§2.5, R-2.5-c). Equal to JavaScript's `Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER`.

```csharp
public const long SafeIntegerMax;
```
